name: ai-agents
description: Build, activate, and manage a complete AI agent team for your business. Design your org chart, activate agents one at a time with the right tools and schedules, set up automated reporting, and build custom skills when off-the-shelf options don't fit. Includes guided tool selection — recommends MBG plugins, native connectors, and Composio so every agent can work autonomously without you needing to be present.
